title: Whip Hand
content:
{{Top|ga|leg|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Whip|more=Hand}} {{IndividualShip |image= |name=''Whip Hand'' |designer= |manufacturer=[[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]]''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' — Based on corresponding data for [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigates]]. |line= |model=[[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigate]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' |type=[[Frigate/Legends|Frigate]] |cost= |modifier= |sysmods= |length=250 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]{{CSWECite|II|243|''Lancer-class frigate''}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigates]]. |width= |height= |mass= |max accel= |mglt= |max speed= |maneuverability= |engine=[[Engine/Legends|Equipped]] |hyperdrive=[[Hyperdrive/Legends|Equipped]] |hdrange= |hdsystem= |poweroutput= |power= |shield gen= |hull= |sensor= |target= |navigation= |avionics= |maincomp= |countermeasures= |armament=[[Turbolaser/Legends|Turbolasers]] |complement= |bays= |escapepods= |crew= |skeleton= |passengers= |capacity= |cargohandling= |consumables= |lifesupport= |communications= |othersystems= |role=Anti-[[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] |commission= |destroyed= |retired= |battles=*[[Second Battle of Obroa-skai]]{{CSWECite|III|328|''Whip Hand''}} *[[Battle over Far Thunder|Battle over ''Far Thunder'']] |affiliation=*[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] |navy=[[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] |fleet= |owners= |captains= |crewmembers= |registry= |aliases= }} {{Quote|This is New Republic cruiser ''Far Thunder''. We and the frigate ''Whip Hand'' are under attack by approximately sixty coralskippers. Our hyperdrive engines are disabled. Coordinates follow. We request assistance from all nearby New Republic forces.|''Far Thunder'' calls for help|}} '''''Whip Hand''''' was a [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigate]] that was initially operated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] before it was captured. Later put to use by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], ''Whip Hand'' participated in a [[Second Battle of Obroa-skai|battle]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]] against [[Yuuzhan Vong]] forces in the [[Obroa-skai system/Legends|Obroa-skai system]] before being assigned to guard the crippled [[Republic-class cruiser|cruiser]] ''[[Far Thunder]]'' as it made its way to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]. However, both [[Starship/Legends|ships]] were [[Battle over Far Thunder|ambushed]] by enemy [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]], and, despite managing to repel the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] with the help of two New Republic [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]], ''Whip Hand'' was forced to destroy the crippled ''Far Thunder'' to prevent the enemy from acquiring it. ==Description== ''Whip Hand'' was a [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigate]] produced by [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] and was designed to battle swarms of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]. Equipped with a [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] and [[Sublight engine/Legends|sublight]] [[Engine/Legends|engines]], the 250-[[Meter/Legends|meter]]-long [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] was armed with [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]] and possessed a [[Bridge (starship)/Legends|bridge]]. ==History== ===Battle at Obroa-skai=== During the early part of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], which pitted the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], ''Whip Hand'' served as an Imperial [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] until it was captured. The ''Lancer''-class frigate ended up in the hands of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the Alliance's successor state, and a refurbished ''Whip Hand'' was operational in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], in which the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]] invaded [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' to [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. ''Whip Hand'' participated in an attack on a Yuuzhan Vong [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] in the [[Obroa-skai system/Legends|Obroa-skai system]]. The frigate and the rest of a New Republic task force waited until the captured Yuuzhan Vong [[Ro'ik chuun m'arh|frigate]] ''[[Trickster]]'' signaled them before [[Hyperspace/Legends|jumping]] in-[[Star system/Legends|system]] to make it appear as if they were tailing the ''Trickster'' and were caught unawares by the Yuuzhan Vong fleet there. The enemy forces fell for the ruse, and the resulting [[Second Battle of Obroa-skai|battle]] ended in the destruction of the majority of the Yuuzhan Vong fleet. ===Protecting ''Far Thunder''=== {{Quote|Where do you want us?''"
"''We're holding our own. Your priority is to help ''Far Thunder''.''"
"''Copy that, ''Whip Hand''.|Twin Suns Leader Jaina Solo and ''Whip Hand'' command|}} [[File:LancerClassFrigate-FF77.png|thumb|right|200px|''Whip Hand'' was a ''Lancer''-class frigate designed to combat starfighters.]] Directly following the Obroa-skai battle, the New Republic's base was shifted to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]], and ''Whip Hand'' was assigned to guard the [[Republic-class cruiser|''Republic''-class cruiser]] ''[[Far Thunder]]'' as it limped to the [[Kashyyyk system/Legends|Kashyyyk system]]. The [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] had been seriously damaged in the fighting at Obroa-skai, and the majority of ''Far Thunder''{{'s}} personnel were evacuated to leave the cruiser with a skeleton crew on its journey. However, after the pair of [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] met up with a [[Fleet tender|tender]] that contained spare parts for ''Far Thunder'', the three ships were [[Battle over Far Thunder|attacked]] in deep [[Realspace/Legends|space]] by around sixty [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]] launched from a pair of Yuuzhan Vong [[Yuuzhan Vong tender|tenders]]. Although designed as an anti-starfighter frigate, ''Whip Hand'' could not protect both itself and the crippled ''Far Thunder'' from the attacking coralskippers, prompting [[Hannser]], the cruiser's [[Captain/Legends|captain]], to issue a [[Distress signal/Legends|call for help]] after the ''Far Thunder''{{'s}} hyperdrive engines were destroyed. By the [[Time/Legends|time]] the New Republic's [[Twin Suns Squadron|Twin Suns]] and [[Scimitar Squadron (New Republic)|Scimitar Squadrons]] arrived on scene, ''Whip Hand'' had resorted to flying abreast of ''Far Thunder'', rolling around the cruiser to wherever the danger from the coralskippers seemed the greatest—the New Republic tender had been destroyed earlier in the fight. As the ''Lancer''-class frigate was holding its own against the starfighters, the reinforcements were directed to aid ''Far Thunder''. However, [[Twin Suns Leader]] [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] first had the frigate modify its position briefly to shield Twin Suns [[Squadron/Legends|Squadron]] from the view of the Yuuzhan Vong ships in order to help catch the coralskippers strafing ''Whip Hand'' unawares. After Twin Suns Squadron made a pass on those starfighters, the squadron went on to engage the coralskippers that were attacking ''Far Thunder''. Despite the aid of the two squadrons, which succeeded in driving off the enemy coralskippers with the help of the two capital ships, ''Far Thunder'' was too badly damaged to be salvageable. Following the evacuation of the cruiser's remaining crew to ''Whip Hand'' by [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], the frigate maneuvered alongside ''Far Thunder'' and blasted the cruiser apart at point-blank range to prevent the Yuuzhan Vong from stealing the ''Republic''-class ship.{{CSWECite|I|257|''Far Thunder''}} ==Behind the scenes== ''Whip Hand'' first appeared in [[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way|''Destiny's Way'']], a [[2002]] novel written by [[Walter Jon Williams]] as the fourteenth installment of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Whip Hand |es=Whip Hand }} [[Category:Captured starships]] [[Category:Lancer-class frigates]] [[Category:Starships of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Starships of the New Republic]]
